name: Winter Games Challenge
short_description: Faster, farther, higher! Fly like an eagle, perform spectacular dramatic half-pipe stunts and race down the ice track or across the slopes. Take on sporting challenges in eight action-packed winter sports disciplines.
detailed_description:
Faster, farther, higher!


Fly like an eagle, perform spectacular dramatic half-pipe stunts and race down the ice track or across the slopes. Take on sporting challenges in eight action-packed winter sports disciplines. Play alone against the AI or together with up to three friends and experience thrilling competitions packed full of fun: Set the record and win the trophy!

  • 5 tournaments with varying levels of difficulty
  • Arrange your own sports event
  • Local multiplayer mode for up to 4 athletes

8 cool winter sports:

• Freestyle skiing
• Snowboard
• Curling
• Giant slalom
• Alpine skiing
• Ski jumping
• Luge
• Bobsleigh
